title: Neobartlettia platyphylla
taxonomy: Neobartlettia platyphylla is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It belongs to the genus Neobartlettia, which is a small group of flowering plants. The plant is native to Australia and is considered a rare and endangered species. The classification of Neobartlettia platyphylla is further refined to the order Brassicales and the clade rosids. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships between Neobartlettia platyphylla and other related plant species.
